explanation: The code prompts the user to input a number in string format with up to 9 characters, checking for valid characters (digits, one minus sign, and one dot). It ensures the proper placement of the minus sign and dot, counts and checks these characters, and converts the validated string into a double type. The final result is printed to the console. If any validation fails, appropriate error messages are displayed and the program exits.
name: 2006-05-07_hw6
subject: HW6_
summary: This project implements a program that converts a string representation of a number into its double type equivalent while validating the input format.
